response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video to identify song segments and comic segments.
2. Identified 'UNDEAD' (YOASOBI) and 'IRIS OUT' (Kenshi Yonezu) from on-screen text.
3. Searched for official lyrics for 'UNDEAD' and 'IRIS OUT'.
4. Resolved performer (Anya) and original artists (YOASOBI/Kenshi Yonezu).
5. Mapped scenes chronologically based on timestamps.
6. Generated JSON with metadata and lyrics, escaping characters correctly.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by Anya, covering two songs, followed by an animated comic segment. The performance includes 'UNDEAD' and 'IRIS OUT'.

scenes.description: Anya performs the song 'IRIS OUT' on a stage with red and purple lighting.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Damn, damn, damn, a morality
That shouts "Quit it, idiot" from inside the brain
Darling baby darling, I'm terribly in love!
Philosophy that makes me twinkle and float
It's dying-ly cute, the way you look up
Scattering insanity to the point of breaking some law
Before I know it, I'm squandering
You, who were born into this world, are at fault
This lovesickness is so terribly hard
My head and this body falling apart
"I love you" sprays out from my carotid artery
Iris out
What should I do with this feeling?
What should I do? It feels like the coarse sugar
Deep in my ribs will melt and become vomit
My pupils are blown wide open, I feel like I'm drowning
Right now, you are the only correct answer in this world
I can't win even if I flip over
You are the only exception to the rules
Even in Othello, all four corners are only black
All-you-can-steal
Abada Kedavra you shot with a smile
Stigma on your forehead
Sorry about that
I'll pierce it, run it through, this is the weak point
It's dying-ly cute, the way you look up
Scattering insanity to the point of breaking some law
Before I know it, I'm squandering
You, who were born into this world, are at fault
A knock-off is fine, anything is fine
I want everything that is named "you" right now
"I love you" sprays out from my carotid artery
Iris out
What should I do with this feeling?
What should I do? It feels like the coarse sugar
Deep in my ribs will melt and become vomit
My pupils are blown wide open, I feel like I'm drowning
Right now, you are the only correct answer in this world

scenes.description: The performance ends and the video transitions to an animated comic/story segment featuring Anya and Ina. No music or vocals.
